mission.title: buildpacks: Provide a way to specify desired platform when creating packages and builders
mission.description: Provide a way to specify desired platform when creating packages and builders. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current buildpacks setup
steps.description:
Verify your buildpacks version and configuration:
```bash
pack version
```
This feature requires a working buildpacks installation.

steps.title: Review buildpacks configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:
With the growing need for ARM64 images, it is a challenge to build them with the current tool support. It would be helpful if we had the ability to cross package buildpacks.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Provide a way to specify desired platform when creating…
steps.description:
Hi all,

Multi-architecture support for buildpacks have been requested (#1459 | #1460 ) for a long time. Recently I have been working on this as part of the Linux Foundation Mentorship program under the mentorship of Juan Bustamante (), Jerico Pena () and Aidan Delaney ()

We would appreciate your ideas and thoughts on how we want to move forward. There is a lot of validations and test to be added along the line. We are having a weekly meetings for multi-arch support every Monday @ 10:00 AM

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Provide a way to specify desired platform when creating…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hi all,

Multi-architecture support for buildpacks have been requested (#1459 | #1460 ) for a long time. Recently I have been working on this as part of the Linux Foundation Mentorship program under the mentorship of Juan Bustamante (), Jerico Pena () and Aidan Delaney ()

We would appreciate your ideas and thoughts on how we want to move forward.

prerequisites.description: A working buildpacks installation or development environment.
